functional_audit.check: exportUserData selects profiles and journal_entries for the authenticated user
Export button triggers JSON blob download with unclouded-export filename
Confirmed deletion removes user-owned rows, signs out, and redirects to /

ui_evidence.notes: Text_body_muted_ subtitle matches IR privacy intro copy
privacy-ai-header group wraps icon + title stack
Export My Data copy correct; missing phosphor download-simple icon and Button_outline_ bubbleStyle class
Delete Account & Data copy correct; missing phosphor trash icon; shadcn destructive variant only
Button_destructive_ on confirm; Yes, Delete Everything copy

gaps: privacy-export-btn and privacy-delete-btn omit IR label_icon phosphor icons
Export button uses shadcn outline variant without Button_outline_ bubbleStyle
Data-controls section uses generic Shield icon without a mapped Bubble icon entity
Export/delete payloads cover only profiles and journal_entries — prototype schema has no chat/check-in tables yet
auth.users row persists after deletion; user can sign in again and trigger handle_new_user profile recreation

critiques.finding: requestAccountDeletion removes journal_entries and profiles then signs out, but does not delete the auth.users record. A returning login recreates a profile via on_auth_user_created.
critiques.alternative: Add a supabase edge function using service_role auth.admin.deleteUser after client-initiated confirmation, or document this as acceptable prototype-scope deletion until full backend parity lands.

critiques.finding: privacy-export-btn and privacy-delete-btn are text-only shadcn buttons; Bubble IR specifies label_icon buttons with download-simple and trash phosphor icons and explicit Button_outline_/Button_destructive_ styles.
critiques.alternative: Render Lucide Download/Trash icons and apply bubbleStyle classes on both tab action buttons to match IR presentation.

critiques.finding: AC-3 cites bTIiN/bTIiS as deletion workflows, but Bubble resolves those action IDs to coaching-mode ChangeThing steps on workflow 024988c5; delete-confirm-btn workflow only HideElement on the popup.
critiques.alternative: Treat implemented Supabase row deletion + sign-out as pragmatic parity; update decompose AC wording on a future pass.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-fix failures (missing DELETE RLS, journal export, sign-out redirect) although code now satisfies those checks.
critiques.alternative: Clear resolved gaps on the next coverage refresh so re-review diffs stay readable.
